debug_info.goal:
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
RSdiff : ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ (M : ℕ), |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε
L : ℝ
hL : SeqLim ℓ L
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N1 N2 : ℕ
N : ℕ := N1 + N2
Nbnd1 : N1 ≤ N
Nbnd2 : N2 ≤ N
hN1 : |ℓ N - L| < ε / 3
Mmax M : ℕ
hM : M ≥ Mmax
hMmax : |(fun N_1 => RiemannSum (f N) a b N_1) M - ℓ N| < ε / 3
hN2 : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 3
⊢ |RiemannSum F a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L|

proof:
have h1 : RiemannSum F a b M - L = (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L) := by ring
  rw [h1]
  have h2 : |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| := abs_sub_comm _ _
  calc |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| 
      ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| + |ℓ N - L| := abs_add _ _
    _ ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by linarith [abs_add (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)]
    _ = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by rw [h2]

    have h2 : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
    have h3 : |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| := abs_sub_comm _ _
    linarith

  have h2 : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
  have h3 : |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| := abs_sub_comm _ _

have h1 : |RiemannSum F a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
  have h2 : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
  have h3 : |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| := abs_sub_comm _ _

calc |RiemannSum F a b M - L| 
      = |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| := by ring_nf

        have h2 : |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| ≤ 
                  |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| := abs_add _ _
        have h3 : |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| := abs_sub_comm _ _
        linarith

calc |RiemannSum F a b M - L| 
      = |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by

  have h2 : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
  have h3 : |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| := abs_sub_comm _ _
